name: All-American Hot Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet until the meat is brown. Drain off the excess fat.
2. Stir in the undrained corn and the rest of the ingredients.
3. To cook in a skillet: Heat the mixture to boiling, then reduce the heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the noodles are tender (about 20 minutes). Serve hot.
4. To cook in the oven: Pour the mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole. Cover and bake at 375 degrees F for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Uncover and bake until the mixture thickens (about 15 minutes). Serve hot.
